data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of the 'Equipment checkout/check-in' requirement. While the use case mentions the need for equipment checkout/check-in, there are no specific details or evidence that demonstrate how this functionality is realized in the system. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming the implementation of equipment checkout/check-in.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API validation for equipment checkout/check-in
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the equipment checkout/check-in process is correctly implemented and can be validated through API responses.
